d10s1.caption: Down the gentle way, up the dramatic way: descend Queen's Garden from Sunrise Point, cross the amphitheater floor, climb out through Wall Street to Sunset Point, stroll the flat rim back.

y2='80' stroke='#B98A56' stroke-width='2.5'/><text x='116' y='88' font-size='10' fill='#22262A' font-weight='700'>⭐ Wall Street slot</text><text x='96' y='68' font-size='13'>📷</text><text x='108' y='70' font-size='9.5' fill='#5A6068'>Thor's Hammer</text><line x1='236' y1='186' x2='236' y2='200' stroke='#B98A56' stroke-width='3'/><line x1='246' y1='182' x2='246' y2='200' stroke='#B98A56' x2='160' y2='204' stroke='#B98A56' stroke-width='3'/><text x='104' y='224' font-size='10' fill='#5A6068'>4.6 km · 180 m down/up · start by 7am</text></svg>

d11s0.caption: One road, one shuttle. Ride to the very end (stop 9) first — the canyon empties from the top down, and the Narrows are why you set the alarm.
d11s0.svg: <svg viewBox='0 0 340 240' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'><path d='M85,30 V208' stroke='#B01E24' stroke-width='4'/><path d='M85,208 V230' stroke='#B01E24' stroke-width='3' stroke-dasharray='4 4'/><text x='98' y='232' font-size='9.5' fill='#5A6068'>free town shuttle from Springdale</text><circle cx='85' cy='206' r='6' fill='#fff' stroke='#B01E24' stroke-width='2.5'/><text x='100' y='202' font-size='10.5' fill='#22262A' font-weight='700'>1 · Visitor Center — board 5:45am</text><circle cx='85' cy='170' r='5' fill='#fff' stroke='#B01E24' stroke-width='2'/><text x='100' y='174' font-size='10' fill='#22262A'>4 · Court of the Patriarchs</text><circle cx='85' cy='140' r='5' fill='#fff' stroke='#B01E24' stroke-width='2'/><text x='100' y='144' font-size='10' fill='#22262A'>5 · Zion Lodge (snacks, restrooms)</text><circle cx='85' cy='110' r='5' fill='#fff' stroke='#B01E24' stroke-width='2'/><text x='100' y='114' font-size='10' fill='#22262A'>6 · The Grotto — Angels Landing TH</text><text x='100' y='126' font-size='8.5' fill='#B01E24'>(permit lottery only)</text><circle cx='85' cy='78' r='5' fill='#fff' stroke='#B01E24' stroke-width='2'/><text x='100' y='82' font-size='10' fill='#22262A'>8 · Big Bend — spot climbers</text><circle cx='85' cy='40' r='7' fill='#F5C518' stroke='#8A6D00' stroke-width='2.5'/><text x='100' y='38' font-size='10.5' fill='#22262A' font-weight='700'>9 · Temple of Sinawava</text><text x='100' y='51' font-size='9.5' fill='#8A6D00' font-weight='700'>⭐ Narrows start — GO HERE FIRST</text><text x='20' y='120' font-size='10' fill='#00693C' font-weight='700' transform='rotate(-90 26 120)'>ride straight to the top ▸</text></svg>

d11s1.caption: The trail is the river. Paved walk to the entry, then wade upstream — Wall Street's closing walls are the reward at ~1.5 h in. Turn around at Big Springs.
d11s1.svg: <svg viewBox='0 0 340 240' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'><text x='14' y='20' font-size='10' fill='#B01E24' font-weight='700'>⚠ any storm forecast = do not enter</text><path d='M126,232 C120,180 130,120 142,62 C146,46 150,36 154,26' fill='none' stroke='#B98A56' stroke-width='4'/><path d='M218,232 C224,180 212,120 196,62 C192,46 188,36 184,26' fill='none' stroke='#B98A56' stroke-width='4'/><path d='M172,232 C168,180 172,120 170,62 C169,46 169,36 169,26' fill='none' stroke='#8FB8D8' stroke-width='9' opacity='0.9'/><rect x='140' y='222' width='64' height='14' rx='2' fill='#fff' stroke='#23272B' stroke-width='1.5'/><text x='144' y='232' font-size='8.5' fill='#22262A'>SHUTTLE STOP 9</text><path d='M206,222 C212,204 214,192 212,178' fill='none' stroke='#697077' stroke-width='3'/><text x='222' y='200' font-size='9.5' fill='#5A6068'>Riverside Walk</text><text x='222' y='211' font-size='9.5' fill='#5A6068'>1.7 km paved</text><text x='214' y='166' font-size='10' fill='#00693C' font-weight='700'>▸ enter the river</text><text x='226' y='142' font-size='12'>⭐</text><text x='238' y='146' font-size='9.5' fill='#22262A'>Mystery Falls (30 min)</text><text x='108' y='120' font-size='10' fill='#8A6D00' transform='rotate(-84 112 120)'>wade upstream ~1.5 h</text><text x='206' y='66' font-size='13'>📷</text><text x='218' y='58' font-size='10.5' fill='#22262A' font-weight='700'>⭐ Wall Street —</text><text x='218' y='70' font-size='9.5' fill='#5A6068'>walls close to 6 m</text><text x='150' y='18' font-size='10' fill='#B01E24' font-weight='700'>Big Springs — turn around</text></svg>

d13s0.caption: The summit lot fills before sunset — Plan B is parking low on Vermont and walking up 15 minutes. Terraces face the city; the lawn faces the Hollywood Sign.
d13s0.svg: <svg viewBox='0 0 340 240' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'><polyline points='16,52 30,38 44,50 58,36 72,48' fill='none' stroke='#B98A56' stroke-width='2.5'/><text x='16' y='28' font-size='9' fill='#5A6068' letter-spacing='2'>HOLLYWOOD</text><rect x='140' y='62' width='64' height='18' rx='2' fill='#fff' stroke='#23272B' stroke-width='1.5'/><circle cx='152' cy='60' r='6' fill='#fff' stroke='#23272B' stroke-width='1.5'/><circle cx='172' cy='56' r='7' fill='#fff' stroke='#23272B' stroke-width='1.5'/><circle cx='192' cy='60' r='6' fill='#fff' stroke='#23272B' stroke-width='1.5'/><text x='212' y='74' font-size='10' fill='#22262A' font-weight='700'>Observatory (free)</text><line x1='140' y1='88' x2='204' y2='88' stroke='#697077' stroke-width='3'/><text x='210' y='92' font-size='13'>📷</text><text x='224' y='94' font-size='10' fill='#22262A'>sunset terraces</text><ellipse cx='100' cy='102' rx='34' ry='14' fill='#B9CDB4' opacity='0.7'/><text x='72' y='106' font-size='9.5' fill='#22262A'>lawn</text><text x='42' y='126' font-size='9.5' fill='#5A6068'>◂ sign view from here</text><rect x='150' y='112' width='44' height='16' rx='3' fill='#EEF2F8' stroke='#10437C' stroke-width='1.5'/><text x='154' y='124' font-size='9.5' fill='#10437C' font-weight='700'>🅿 summit</text><text x='200' y='124' font-size='9' fill='#B01E24' font-weight='700'>full by ~6pm ⚠</text><path d='M172,130 C210,150 150,172 196,196 C216,208 200,222 190,228' fill='none' stroke='#697077' stroke-width='5'/><text x='226' y='214' font-size='9.5' fill='#5A6068'>W Observatory Rd</text><path d='M258,224 C240,194 224,164 208,138' fill='none' stroke='#D69500' stroke-width='2.5' stroke-dasharray='6 4'/><text x='252' y='240' font-size='9.5' fill='#8A6D00'>walk up from Vermont Ave lots · 15 min</text></svg>

d14s0.caption: Two tiers connected by the Starway escalators. Numbers = your order. Nintendo before the crowd, Lower Lot while it's building, Studio Tour seated in the midday heat, Hogwarts after.

font-weight='700'>Super Nintendo World</text><text x='86' y='72' font-size='9' fill='#5A6068'>Mario Kart first, rope-drop run</text><circle cx='140' cy='104' r='9' fill='#B01E24'/><text x='136' fill='#5A6068'>midday — seated + shaded</text><circle cx='252' cy='62' r='9' fill='#B01E24'/><text x='248' y='66' font-size='11' fill='#fff' font-weight='700'>4</text><text x='266' y='60' font-size='10.5' fill='#22262A' font-weight='700'>Hogwarts</text><text x='250' y='74' font-size='9' fill='#5A6068'>+ Butterbeer</text><circle cx='292' cy='106' r='9' fill='#B01E24'/><text x='288' y='110' font-size='11' fill='#fff' font-weight='700'>5</text><text x='226' y='132' font-size='9.5' fill='#22262A'>WaterWorld — splash zone</text><path d='M170,142 L192,182' stroke='#697077' stroke-width='5'/><text x='198' y='168' font-size='9.5' fill='#5A6068'>Starway escalators</text><rect x='110' y='184' width='202' height='44' rx='12' fill='#EAF2F8' stroke='#10437C' stroke-width='2'/><text x='118' y='180' font-size='9.5' fill='#10437C' letter-spacing='2'>LOWER LOT</text><circle cx='140' cy='206' r='9' fill='#B01E24'/><text x='136' y='210' font-size='11' fill='#fff' font-weight='700'>2</text><text x='154' y='204' font-size='10.5' fill='#22262A' font-weight='700'>Jurassic · Transformers · Mummy</text><text x='154' y='217' font-size='9' fill='#5A6068'>one visit — use single-rider lines</text></svg>

d15s0.caption: Everything worth seeing is strung along the boardwalk: arch photo at the entrance, the Route 66 sign mid-pier, wheel at the end. Venice is a 30-minute walk south on the sand.
d15s0.svg: <svg viewBox='0 0 340 240' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'><path d='M10,96 L330,72 L330,10 L10,10 Z' fill='#F3E4CE'/><path d='M10,96 L330,72 L330,235 L10,235 Z' fill='#CFE3F2'/><text x='40' y='210' font-size='10' fill='#5A6068'>Pacific — 19°C, be brave</text><path d='M296,76 L70,168' stroke='#C9A227' stroke-width='12' stroke-linecap='round'/><text x='284' y='58' font-size='13'>📷</text><text x='232' y='50' font-size='10' fill='#22262A' font-weight='700'>neon arch entrance</text><rect x='222' y='96' width='20' height='14' fill='#fff' stroke='#23272B' stroke-width='1.5' transform='rotate(-21 232 103)'/><text x='250' y='106' font-size='9.5' fill='#5A6068'>1922 carousel</text><text x='168' y='120' font-size='12'>⭐</text><text x='150' y='108' font-size='10.5' fill='#22262A' font-weight='700'>ROUTE 66 — END sign 📷</text><circle cx='118' cy='148' r='13' fill='none' stroke='#B01E24' stroke-width='2.5'/><line x1='118' y1='135' x2='118' y2='161' stroke='#B01E24' stroke-width='1.5'/><line x1='105' y1='148' x2='131' y2='148' stroke='#B01E24' stroke-width='1.5'/><text x='84' y='176' font-size='9.5' fill='#22262A'>solar Ferris wheel — sunset ride</text><text x='58' y='158' font-size='9.5' fill='#5A6068'>fishermen + pelicans at the tip</text><rect x='296' y='96' width='34' height='16' rx='3' fill='#EEF2F8' stroke='#10437C' stroke-width='1.5'/><text x='300' y='108' font-size='9.5' fill='#10437C' font-weight='700'>🅿 ~$15</text><text x='216' y='226' font-size='10' fill='#8A6D00'>▾ Venice: 30 min walk south on the sand</text></svg>

d16s0.caption: Hub-and-spoke: everything radiates from the castle. Numbers = your order — Galaxy's Edge at rope drop, Space Mountain second, then the classics spine; one planned loop, don't ping-pong between lands.
d16s0.svg: <svg viewBox='0 0 340 240' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'><circle cx='170' cy='212' r='6' fill='#fff' stroke='#00693C' stroke-width='2.5'/><text x='182' y='216' font-size='10'
